prompt: [Person] Refer to Image 1 [Signature] In the lower right, there is a small Threads logo operated by Meta, and above it, "CHAse" is written small in white cursive like a signature. [Pose and Expression] A full-body action pose captured at the moment of sprinting dynamically to hit a ball on an outdoor tennis court. The character is swinging a tennis racket strongly with their right hand, and a yellow tennis ball is captured flying instantly in front of the racket frame. They are staring straight ahead with serious and intense eyes as if completely immersed in the match, and a sense of sports-specific tension and healthy energy is felt from the slightly parted lips. [Clothing] Wearing a sophisticated cream white halter neck crop top with intricate panel decorations and stitch lines. For the bottom, they are wearing a matching flared mini skirt that flutters lightly with movement, and the hem of the skirt features a translucent horizontal stripe mesh detail for added style. A white sports wristband is worn on the left wrist, and clean white tennis shoes are on the feet. [Hair and Makeup] Long wavy hairstyle blowing wildly and naturally in all directions due to intense movement and wind. The makeup is based on a fair skin expression with a subtle glow as if feeling the heat and sweat during exercise, and calm nude pink lips stand out. A thin silver chain necklace is worn around the neck, and simple mini ring earrings are worn in the ears to give a delicate point to the sporty look. [Lighting] Warm and dazzling natural sunlight shining on an outdoor court on a clear day. Intense sunlight pouring from the top left creates bright highlights on the shoulder line and hair spreading in all directions, creating a warm golden-toned afterglow throughout the screen. However, there is a shadow on the front of the figure. [Texture and Mood] A warm beige and light turquoise (retro blue) color mood with a vintage and classic sports pictorial sensibility. To express a sense of speed, a dynamic motion blur texture is applied around the racket, tennis ball, and legs to maximize visual energy, creating a wonderful contrast with the soft and smooth texture of functional sportswear. [Camera and Angle] Shot using f/4.0 aperture, 1/2000s shutter speed, ISO 200, and a 28mm wide-angle lens. A low-angle shot looking up from the ground to capture the athlete's dynamic leap and speed even more majestically. While the upper body and expression are clearly focused, the racket in the foreground and the surrounding background are dramatically blurred due to the unique distortion and intentional movement effects of the wide-angle view. There is a fine film grain of a 70s cinematic film tone. [Background Elements] A grid-patterned black tennis court fence (net) crosses long behind the figure, creating a sense of space. Above the fence, a clear light blue background faded to a warm golden tone without a single cloud stretches wide, and on the floor, part of the green court surface and white baseline are slightly caught with a high-speed blur effect. 9:16 ratio. Analog film vibe.
